content: *마법봉, 매우 희귀 (주문시전자의 조율 필요)* --- 이 마법봉은 7개의 충전을 지니고 있습니다. 마법봉을 들고 있는 동안, 충전 1개를 소모하여 [변신](/1def7f5a1e80819bad8dcd252b643cd6?pvs=25)(내성 DC 15) 주문을 시전할 수 있습니다. - **충전 회복:** 이 마법봉은 매일 새벽에 1d6+1개의 소모된 충전을 회복합니다. 마지막 충전을 사용할 경우 d20을 굴려야 하며, 1이 나오면 마법봉이 재가 되어 파괴됩니다. {color="red"} --- ![](https://prod-files-secure.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/8dffc202-0f6e-4adf-b208-fc378f0d8bf3/c5c85cac-fbb3-422c-bd56-380ff18da300/638657414209995120.png?X-Amz-Algorithm=AWS4-HMAC-SHA256&X-Amz-Content-Sha256=UNSIGNED-PAYLOAD&X-Amz-Credential=ASIAZI2LB4667IX25YEC%2F20260616%2Fus-west-2%2Fs3%2Faws4_request&X-Amz-Date=20260616T094215Z&X-Amz-Expires=3600&X-Amz-Security-Token=IQoJb3JpZ2luX2VjEKf%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2FwEaCXVzLXdlc3QtMiJGMEQCIFf9xrpgYOw4vptquicgR0Odlqgkml6kEwAhOniEx8lMAiBz9IxX1nGfz2MJZBejOZSg0CJmCl0pHPJqBW1noHwOXSr%2FAwhwEAAaDDYzNzQyMzE4MzgwNSIM2IegJgu8wAEYRHzPKtwDc6ik7UW9t3UV6iV97zqUNXeN3JdhRY4IeNXW40lLfBAJXzs4NlBTDTokvp31YPW1nH7Vw62zx%2FH%2FPXe7TjN6oV5uE5s0fteK6ixdz8lBdAMVZRtSKeM%2BTsewpSYPPH2AC5GC1ervPd3Q664c8G%2BseKaNhSrZqDRR5Xs%2FPfF419xrYUw6gcMw2CvjfsF3%2FKBYm%2FFbOgSGXdyN18eWAg%2FgyhICMrMx80QiWmecAOux%2FYutzGhzysULgLf0rNdBSlfaEgLYoaWiNOOQrOxTJuNf1MZadbkKbXp%2FilAkyHpvGL8UMQt2EzrJj56FQdRgP0mvI1sACUOPaZdzjGscK3UO08y%2Bz2%2FeclKLS%2Fk0B8k5sAQPrpLRx2fazl5dOx8K0RvOuNVnBCJWD77yyonA0SdA5E%2FdMsdRCAiSeIHXFMsJii56xC8VXIVue4g%2BguvYWajf1apnUOVb4BS4KzLGIL8Umw8Q7zc9u6q2%2FomBFuF9gW5n2Gn7jSibxxj%2FzA707XXr7ntXhdizHjpjoszS6P1rjziC1cFjjNbBNDZXjDdSt4wtkLOBNldMvnXPNB44HacbRPkQX2uArhpO8AZ%2F6RDsLgqrlCQ5FaFb4I1J2VRfMwVO122tXD8WVthaTVAwjtzD0QY6pgFsqJo8s5eZyV51DcT3PadWLBJbO%2FDEM3c6uUhfymTD6Pg8tUNbxN2gIlrQz3KwWgeheHwG9rKa7pK4j0RghcWuiptJb%2FswcZhafleWCgzR5whFtpsjLiTeAogJt1YXEH%2F1bNX9hO%2BDqKT74Z0183WrW4oPxUH4sCD%2BC6XvlSKoOdRv9%2FLnKaHuScaQWV3ERQvEz2TaZ8gZxL5oqctpfNeWqVarzR7C&X-Amz-Signature=5fea5722fe1598f5deb64d6dfe56f999c9bbdc47c3543778253a5f951308da33&X-Amz-SignedHeaders=host&x-amz-checksum-mode=ENABLED&x-id=GetObject)
